$comment: Phase 1 schema. Two deliberate decisions locked here: (1) intent is strict enum — violations trigger retry, which measures planning prompt quality against the 90% validity exit criterion. Free string would defeat that signal. (2) args is free object — typed per action requires knowing the full action vocabulary, which Phase 1 generates. Type it in Phase 2 based on observed data, not assumptions.

intent.$comment: Strict enum. Hard fail on anything outside these four values.

id.$comment: String ID, not integer. No sequential assumption. step_1, step_read, etc.

args.$comment: Free object for Phase 1. Observe what the model produces, type per action in Phase 2.
